description: Named issue views — the default selection surface for fak dispatch and triage. This is the API-readable mirror of the GitHub saved views at https://github.com/anthony-chaudhary/fak/issues/views, which hydrate client-side and are NOT reachable through gh/REST/GraphQL. Edit views here; reconcile against the GitHub UI by hand. Each `query` is GitHub issue-search syntax fed verbatim to `gh issue list --search`. NOTE: `label:a,b` (comma) is OR; two separate `label:` tokens are AND. Always paired with an explicit --limit because gh defaults to 30.

views.title: Ready leaves
views.query: is:open -label:epic -label:research no:assignee
views.note: The default 'what should I work on' surface: unclaimed, non-epic, non-research issues — the dispatchable backlog. Epics are umbrellas (see `epics`); research is design-shaped (not ship-ready).

views.title: P0/P1 leaves
views.query: is:open label:priority/P0,priority/P1 -label:epic sort:created-asc
views.note: Prioritized, dispatchable leaves. P0 = load-bearing, do first; P1 = high priority. Oldest-first so the long-waiting work surfaces.

views.title: Epics (decompose, don't dispatch)
views.query: is:open label:epic
views.note: Parent/umbrella issues that group child leaves by track. Feed these to /dos-replan to decompose — do NOT dispatch an epic as a single leaf.

views.title: Needs human triage
views.query: is:open label:idea-scout
views.note: Auto-filed by the daily idea-scout (tools/idea_scout.py). A standing queue for the /issue-triage pass — set priority/kind/area before they become dispatchable. Often empty; that means triage is caught up.

views.title: Help wanted
views.query: is:open label:"help wanted" -label:epic
views.note: Issues flagged as good hand-offs / extra attention needed — the surface to point a new contributor or a spare worker at.

views.title: Good first issue
views.query: is:open label:"good first issue"
views.note: Newcomer-friendly leaves. Smallest blast radius; good for a cold-start worker.

views.title: Agentic serving
views.query: is:open label:agentic-serving -label:epic
views.note: Area cluster: coherent agentic-first serving (cross-agent shared cache + correctness-gated invalidation). The largest single area in the backlog.

views.title: Substrate / ABI
views.query: is:open label:substrate -label:epic
views.note: Area cluster: substrate / standard / ABI-as-public-contract work.

views.title: Trust floor
views.query: is:open label:trust-floor -label:epic
views.note: Area cluster: wire the trust floor (Decide-vs-Syscall gap + dormant-until-wired seams).

views.title: GPU / compute
views.query: is:open label:gpu,compute,multi-gpu,metal -label:epic
views.note: Area cluster (OR over gpu/compute/multi-gpu/metal): the GPU-backend and kernel work. Often gated on a physical device witness.

views.title: Current focus (operator-marked)
views.query: is:open label:current -label:epic no:assignee
views.note: The fleet's DEFAULT dispatch focus (`fak dispatch tick` passes --view current). GitHub milestones cannot carry a label, so 'current' is marked TWO ways: (1) slap the `current` label on specific issues (fine-grained) — they surface here; (2) to make a WHOLE milestone current, edit this query to `is:open milestone:"<title>" -label:epic no:assignee`. Empty by default, so the tick fail-softs to the full open backlog until you mark something.

views.title: M1 · Durable sessions
views.query: is:open milestone:"Durable sessions survive 429s, overload & process death" -label:epic no:assignee
views.note: Dispatchable leaves of milestone M1.

views.title: M2 · KV cache owned/observed/2x
views.query: is:open milestone:"The KV cache value is owned, observed & 2x" -label:epic no:assignee
views.note: Dispatchable leaves of milestone M2.

views.title: M3 · Disaggregated serving
views.query: is:open milestone:"Disaggregated serving at throughput parity on one spine" -label:epic no:assignee
views.note: Dispatchable leaves of milestone M3.

views.title: M4 · Decode parity
views.query: is:open milestone:"Decode parity across every backend (GPU/Metal/CPU)" -label:epic no:assignee
views.note: Dispatchable leaves of milestone M4.

views.title: M5 · Win the benchmarks
views.query: is:open milestone:"Win the benchmarks we enter (Terminal-Bench #1 + portfolio)" -label:epic no:assignee
views.note: Dispatchable leaves of milestone M5.

views.title: M6 · 10x agentic loop
views.query: is:open milestone:"10x agentic coding loop with witnessed self-correction" -label:epic no:assignee
views.note: Dispatchable leaves of milestone M6.

views.title: M7 · Auto-release on green trunk
views.query: is:open milestone:"Ship releases automatically on a green trunk" -label:epic no:assignee
views.note: Dispatchable leaves of milestone M7.

views.title: M8 · Fleet observability
views.query: is:open milestone:"Fleet observability you can trust" -label:epic no:assignee
views.note: Dispatchable leaves of milestone M8.

views.title: M9 · Dispatch fleet to 100 workers
views.query: is:open milestone:"Scale the dispatch fleet to 100 workers" -label:epic no:assignee
views.note: Dispatchable leaves of milestone M9.

views.title: M10 · Model support & routing
views.query: is:open milestone:"Model support & routing parity (Ornith + ensembles)" -label:epic no:assignee
views.note: Dispatchable leaves of milestone M10.

views.title: M11 · Substrate / grammar / interop
views.query: is:open milestone:"Substrate, grammar & interop foundation" -label:epic no:assignee
views.note: Dispatchable leaves of milestone M11.
